title: Updating Apps
drDigitalIntro:
App updates bring new features and security fixes.
• Keeping apps updated protects you from bugs and security holes.
• Most devices can update apps automatically.
• Updates are free — even for paid apps.

playgroundTask.goal: You installed and updated an app

steps.say: Search for 'Weather' in the App Market.
Click on WeatherNow to see its details.
Click 'My Apps' to see your installed apps.
WeatherNow has an update available — click Update next to it.

drDigitalSuccess: You updated an app! Keeping apps updated protects you from security vulnerabilities and gives you new features.
drDigitalHint: Install the app first, then go to My Apps and look for the Update button.
